"'''Mutiny on the Rand Ecliptic'''" is a short story written by [[Michael Stern]], originally published in the ''[[Galaxy Guide 3: The Empire Strikes Back]]'' and later reprinted in the sourcebook's [[Galaxy Guide 3: The Empire Strikes Back (Second Edition)|second edition]] as well as ''[[The Movie Trilogy Sourcebook]]''. It was subsequently archived on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].

==Plot summary==
[[Derek Klivian/Legends|Derek "Hobbie" Klivian's]] account of the mutiny on the [[Rand Ecliptic/Legends|''Rand Ecliptic'']] led by himself and [[Biggs Darklighter/Legends|Biggs Darklighter]]. He is telling the tale to [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] onboard the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Redemption/Legends|medical frigate]] following the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]].

===Notes===
This account of the mutiny greatly differs from the version seen in the ''[[Star Wars: Empire]]'' story arc, [[Star Wars: Empire: Darklighter|''Darklighter'']].
